title: Puffed French English Muffins Souffle-Style English Muffin
description: A jammy, crisp, and nostalgic French dish featuring English muffins in a soufflé form, suitable for Jain diet. This recipe is perfect for a weeknight breakfast or brunch.
instructions: In a small saucepan, melt the butter over low heat.
Once melted, stir in the sugar until dissolved.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the eggs and a pinch of salt.
In another bowl, whisk together the flour, milk, and vanilla extract.
Add the flour mixture to the egg mixture and whisk until smooth.
Add the sugar mixture to the egg mixture and whisk until combined.
Butter a 6-inch (15cm) soufflé dish and set aside.
Arrange the English muffin halves in the prepared dish.
Pour the egg mixture evenly over the muffins.
Dust with confectioners' sugar and bake for 20-25 minutes.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 5 minutes.
Dust with confectioners' sugar again and serve immediately.
